---
name: Feature Request
description: Suggest a new audit check or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A description of the problem (e.g. "AgentLighthouse doesn't check X").

**Proposed solution**
Describe the check or feature you'd like added.

**Category**
- [ ] New audit check
- [ ] UI/UX improvement
- [ ] API enhancement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Performance

**Additional context**
Any references, examples, or URLs that demonstrate the need.
